title: No Explosion Particles
description: Texture that removes explosion particles, improving visibility and performance in Crystal PvP.
body:
![No Explosion Particles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec6850c8c92439a6ae66435bf239b656ab9ac6af.png)

# 

This texture pack removes explosion particles to give you a cleaner screen during fights. It helps you see your opponent more clearly and react faster, which is especially useful in Crystal PvP. It can also improve performance by reducing visual clutter, making your gameplay smoother and more consistent.

#
